nasb.text: and a third of the creatures which were in the sea and had life, died; and a third of the ships were destroyed.

esv.text: A third of the living creatures in the sea died, and a third of the ships were destroyed.

cnv.text: 海裡受造的活物死了三分之一，船隻也毀壞了三分之一。

ccb.text: 海中的活物死了三分之一，船只也被毁了三分之一。

csbs.text: 海中有生命的被造之物的三分之一也死了，众船只的三分之一也被毁了。
